info.name: Interview Prep Platform API — Users
info.description:
Users module endpoints for the AI-Powered Interview Preparation Platform.

Base URL: `http://localhost:4000/api`

All responses use:
```json
{ "success": true, "message": "", "data": { "user": {} } }
```

**Prerequisites:**
1. Run the **Login** request from the Auth collection first.
2. The `accessToken` collection variable will be set automatically.
3. Both endpoints here use that token for Bearer auth.

request.description:
Protected route. Returns the authenticated user's full profile.

**Frontend integration (AuthLayout.tsx):**
After a successful login, call this endpoint to fetch the full profile from the database and hydrate `AppContext.user` via `setUser(data.user)`.

The returned shape matches `UserProfile` in `src/store/AppContext.tsx` exactly.

**Routing decision:** If `data.user.diagnosticCompleted === false`, navigate to `onboarding`; otherwise navigate to `dashboard`.

**401** — Missing or expired JWT

response.name: 200 OK — Full profile (new user)
200 OK — Full profile (returning user)
401 Expired Token

request.description:
Called from **OnboardingFlow.tsx Step 1** when the user clicks 'Next Step'.

Persists `targetCompany`, `roleDepth`, and `prepWeeks` to the database.

Only sends the fields being updated — all other profile fields are unchanged.

**Immutable fields ignored:** email, password, subscription, createdAt, updatedAt

response.name: 200 OK — Step 1 saved

item.name: Update My Profile — Mark Diagnostic Complete

request.description:
Called from **OnboardingFlow.tsx Step 3** (after running the diagnostic) or **Step 2** (when the user clicks 'Skip').

Sets `diagnosticCompleted: true` in the database so the auth routing check will send the user directly to the dashboard on subsequent logins.

response.name: 200 OK — Diagnostic marked complete

request.description: Partial update — only name is changed. All other fields remain as stored in the database.
Demonstrates a 400 Validation Error. `roleDepth: 'Lead'` is not a valid enum value and `prepWeeks: 1` is below the minimum of 2.

response.name: 400 Validation Error
